




```{r, echo = FALSE}
library(googlesheets4)
library(googledrive)
library(dplyr)

Year1<- 2019


googledrive::drive_auth()
MSI <- read_sheet("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/10Lin6dPEMr_VO0n-Um455IlmkMBrnU8zgzaJGaiAOPI/edit?gid=1774480449#gid=1774480449")

MSIrw<- MSI %>%
  filter(Year>=Year1, Year<=Year1+4, Determined Taxon =="RIWH") 
 # %>% fliter(Determined Taxon =="RIWH")

```
